titlestmt.titleproper: Preliminary Guide to the Souvenir Theatrical Postcard Collection
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Arts Library Staff

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday December 7, 2018 at 00:06

did.unittitle: Souvenir Theatrical Postcard Collection
did.abstract: The collection consists of 19th century and early 20th century souvenir theatrical postcards documenting performers in full costume.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The Souvenir Theatrical Postcard Collection was housed in the former Drama Library until its transfer to the Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library in 2008.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Souvenir Theatrical Postcard Collection, Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of 19th-century and early 20th-century souvenir theatrical postcards documenting performers in full costume.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Performers are identified by name in the folder listings. When a performer is depicted in more than one postcard, the total number of postcards is given in parentheses, following the person's name. Please note that not all images of a single performer are necessarily grouped together. The entire box listing should be consulted in order to determine holdings.
